markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on strategy for weekly kickoffs and review the sales pipeline, focusing on improving client qualification and expectation setting.](https://fathom.video/share/nDWDqUnoqumXk75U4FBgknSWyMRo1Tqf?tab=summary&timestamp=10.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Need to improve client qualification process and expectation setting during sales to prevent misalignment and potential churn](https://fathom.video/share/nDWDqUnoqumXk75U4FBgknSWyMRo1Tqf?tab=summary&timestamp=113.0)
  - [Revive and refine the ICP (Ideal Customer Profile) matrix to better qualify prospects and inform sales decisions](https://fathom.video/share/nDWDqUnoqumXk75U4FBgknSWyMRo1Tqf?tab=summary&timestamp=254.0)
  - [Balance between maintaining growth and ensuring quality delivery; team agrees to prioritize process improvement over increasing weekly kickoffs](https://fathom.video/share/nDWDqUnoqumXk75U4FBgknSWyMRo1Tqf?tab=summary&timestamp=521.0)
  - [Improve handoff and communication between sales and delivery teams to ensure all relevant information is shared](https://fathom.video/share/nDWDqUnoqumXk75U4FBgknSWyMRo1Tqf?tab=summary&timestamp=649.0)

## Topics

### Client Qualification and Expectation Setting

  - [Current process shows gaps in communicating client expectations from sales to delivery team](https://fathom.video/share/nDWDqUnoqumXk75U4FBgknSWyMRo1Tqf?tab=summary&timestamp=649.0)
  - [Need for a document outlining key information required before client contract signing](https://fathom.video/share/nDWDqUnoqumXk75U4FBgknSWyMRo1Tqf?tab=summary&timestamp=657.0)
  - [Suggestion to incorporate more qualifying questions from kickoff into sales conversations](https://fathom.video/share/nDWDqUnoqumXk75U4FBgknSWyMRo1Tqf?tab=summary&timestamp=369.0)
  - [Importance of understanding client's existing content, CMS, and resources to better prepare for delivery](https://fathom.video/share/nDWDqUnoqumXk75U4FBgknSWyMRo1Tqf?tab=summary&timestamp=201.0)

### ICP Matrix and Sales Process

  - [Existing ICP matrix needs refinement and consistent application in sales process](https://fathom.video/share/nDWDqUnoqumXk75U4FBgknSWyMRo1Tqf?tab=summary&timestamp=700.0)
  - [George and Tyler to collaborate on updating and implementing ICP criteria](https://fathom.video/share/nDWDqUnoqumXk75U4FBgknSWyMRo1Tqf?tab=summary&timestamp=565.0)
  - [Discussion on whether to disqualify companies based on specific criteria (e.g., traffic, funding stage)](https://fathom.video/share/nDWDqUnoqumXk75U4FBgknSWyMRo1Tqf?tab=summary&timestamp=1047.0)
  - [Caution against blanket disqualification of early-stage companies, as some have been successful clients](https://fathom.video/share/nDWDqUnoqumXk75U4FBgknSWyMRo1Tqf?tab=summary&timestamp=1157.0)

### Pricing and Scope for Additional Services

  - [Debate on whether to establish pricing for additional lanes beyond editorial in phase two upfront](https://fathom.video/share/nDWDqUnoqumXk75U4FBgknSWyMRo1Tqf?tab=summary&timestamp=1180.0)
  - [Suggestion to test including additional services in initial discussions and pricing](https://fathom.video/share/nDWDqUnoqumXk75U4FBgknSWyMRo1Tqf?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
  - [Current disconnect between sales commitments and delivery team awareness for some clients (e.g., Lovable, Understory)](https://fathom.video/share/nDWDqUnoqumXk75U4FBgknSWyMRo1Tqf?tab=summary&timestamp=1360.0)
  - [Need to improve documentation and communication of agreed work streams in HubSpot](https://fathom.video/share/nDWDqUnoqumXk75U4FBgknSWyMRo1Tqf?tab=summary&timestamp=1387.0)

### Capacity and Growth Considerations

  - [Team leans towards maintaining current capacity (2 kickoffs/week) rather than increasing to 3](https://fathom.video/share/nDWDqUnoqumXk75U4FBgknSWyMRo1Tqf?tab=summary&timestamp=1404.0)
  - [Focus on improving qualification and handoff processes before expanding capacity](https://fathom.video/share/nDWDqUnoqumXk75U4FBgknSWyMRo1Tqf?tab=summary&timestamp=1412.0)
  - [Concerns about potential churn if team overextends without proper processes in place](https://fathom.video/share/nDWDqUnoqumXk75U4FBgknSWyMRo1Tqf?tab=summary&timestamp=1418.0)

### Examples and Case Studies

  - [Need for more diverse examples beyond Augment Code to showcase capabilities to potential clients](https://fathom.video/share/nDWDqUnoqumXk75U4FBgknSWyMRo1Tqf?tab=summary&timestamp=734.0)
  - [Suggestion to find and highlight wins from other clients, especially for editorial-focused engagements](https://fathom.video/share/nDWDqUnoqumXk75U4FBgknSWyMRo1Tqf?tab=summary&timestamp=1438.0)

## Next Steps

  - [George and Tyler to review and update ICP matrix, incorporating it into sales scripts](https://fathom.video/share/nDWDqUnoqumXk75U4FBgknSWyMRo1Tqf?tab=summary&timestamp=565.0)
  - [Create a document outlining required information to gather before client contract signing](https://fathom.video/share/nDWDqUnoqumXk75U4FBgknSWyMRo1Tqf?tab=summary&timestamp=657.0)
  - [Improve documentation of agreed work streams in HubSpot for better sales-to-delivery handoff](https://fathom.video/share/nDWDqUnoqumXk75U4FBgknSWyMRo1Tqf?tab=summary&timestamp=1387.0)
  - [Team to have regular discussions on sales process improvements and client qualification](https://fathom.video/share/nDWDqUnoqumXk75U4FBgknSWyMRo1Tqf?tab=summary&timestamp=1396.0)
  - [Explore and develop more case studies and examples beyond Augment Code for sales presentations](https://fathom.video/share/nDWDqUnoqumXk75U4FBgknSWyMRo1Tqf?tab=summary&timestamp=1438.0)
